Unkindness of Ravens.name: 鸦群 Unkindness of Ravens
Unkindness of Ravens.description:
生命值 65; 重伤 32
抗性 half 伤害 from melee and ranged attacks Vulnerable 5 against close and area attacks 		先攻 +9
AC 21Fort 14Ref 19Will 17
速度 3, 飞行 8 (hover)
属性力量 4 (0)
体质 9 (+2)		敏捷 19 (+7)
智力 3 (null)		感知 14 (+5)
魅力 6 (+1)
语言 -
阵营 Unaligned
感官 昏暗视觉
被动 Perception 15 | Insight 15

特性

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⌀ <b>Claws and Beaks</b> ✦ <b>Aura</b> 1</p><p>Any enemy that starts its turn within the aura takes 5 伤害.</p>]] ⌀ 利爪与尖喙 Claws and Claws and Beaks ✦ 灵气 1

任何在灵气内开始其回合的敌人受到5点伤害。 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Blot the Sun</b> <b></b></p><p>An unkindness of ravens blocks line of sight. Creatures entirely in its space are blinded.</p>]]

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Unkind Attack</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one 生物); +9 vs. Reflex</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 1d4 + 3 伤害, and the target is blinded until the unkindness of ravens’ next turn.</p>]] (⚔) 鸦群攻击 Unkind Unkind Attack ✦ 随意

随意 [[/roll 1d4 + 3#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Unkind Attack</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 1d4 + 3 伤害, and the target is blinded until the unkindness of ravens’ next turn.</p>]]

标准动作

攻击：近战 1（一个生物）

+9 vs. 反射

命中：1d4 + 3点伤害，且目标目盲直到鸦群的下一个回合。

触发动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;"> <b>Scattering of Feathers</b> (teleportation) ✦ <b>Encounter</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> The unkindness is first bloodied.</p><p><i>Effect (Immediate Reaction):</i> The unkindness is removed from play until the start of its next turn. When the effect ends, the unkindness returns to play in any space within 5 squares of the space it last occupied.</p>]] 散羽 Scattering of Scattering of Feathers (teleportation) ✦ 遭遇

触发动作

触发：鸦群首次重伤。

效果（即时反应）：鸦群从游戏中移除，直到其下一个回合开始。效果结束时，鸦群返回到其最后占据空间5格内的任意空间。

（AI 翻译，未经人工校对）

Water Mephit.name: 水魔蝠 Water Mephit
Water Mephit.description:
生命值 46; 重伤 23
免疫 acid 		先攻 +1
AC 17Fort 16Ref 14Will 15
速度 6, 飞行 6, 游泳 6
属性力量 17 (+4)
体质 14 (+3)		敏捷 10 (+1)
智力 8 (0)		感知 8 (0)
魅力 14 (+3)
语言 Common, Primordial
阵营 Unaligned
技能 Bluff +8感官
被动 Perception 10 | Insight 10

特性

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Regeneration</b> <b></b></p><p>The mephit regains 5 hit points whenever it starts its turn and has at least 1 hit point. When the mephit takes cold or fire 伤害, its regeneration does not function on its next turn.</p>]] 再生 Regeneration

水魔蝠在其回合开始时若至少拥有1点生命值，则恢复5点生命值。当水魔蝠受到寒冷或火焰伤害时，其再生能力在下一回合不会生效。

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Claws</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one 生物); +8 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d6 + 4 伤害.</p>]] (⚔) 利爪 Claws ✦ 随意

命中： 2d6 + 4点伤害。 [[/roll 2d6 + 4#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Claws</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d6 + 4 伤害.</p>]]

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Acid Breath</b> (acid, zone) ✦ Recharge ⚄ ⚅</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Close blast 3 (creatures in the blast); +6 vs. Reflex</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 1d6 + 3 acid 伤害.</p><p><i>Miss:</i> Half 伤害.</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The blast creates a zone that lasts until the end of the encounter or until the mephit uses this power again. The zone is lightly obscured, and a 生物 that ends its turn in the zone takes 5 acid 伤害.</p>]]

[[/roll 1d6 + 3#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Acid Breath</b> (acid, zone) ✦ Recharge ⚄ ⚅</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 1d6 + 3 acid 伤害.</p>]]

次要动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Water Blast</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Close blast 3 (creatures in the blast); +6 vs. Fortitude</p><p><i>Hit:</i> The mephit slides the target up to 2 squares.</p><p><i>Miss:</i> The mephit can push the target 1 square.</p>]] ᗕ 水爆 Water Water Blast ✦ 随意

失手： 水魔蝠可以将目标推离1格。

（AI 翻译，未经人工校对）

强酸吐息 Acid Breath

+6 vs. 反射

Mahin'drazal Guard.description:
生命值 106; 重伤 53
免疫 fear 		先攻 +10
AC 26Fort 24Ref 22Will 21
速度 6
属性力量 21 (+10)
体质 18 (+9)		敏捷 17 (+8)

感官

特性

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Devoted of Zindriel</b> <b></b></p><p>Any time the guard is hit by an attack against its Will, the guard takes 伤害 as normal, but ignores all other effects of the attack.</p>]] 辛德里尔之虔信 Devoted of Devoted of Zindriel

每当守卫被针对意志的攻击命中时，守卫正常承受伤害，但忽略该攻击的所有其他效果。

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Longsword</b> (weapon) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 1 (one 生物); +15 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d8 + 9 伤害. If the target is adjacent to Zindriel, the target takes 2d8 extra 伤害 from the attack.</p>]] (⚔) 长剑 Longsword (weapon) ✦ 随意

随意 ✦ 武器 [[/roll [[/roll 2d8 #<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Longsword</b> (weapon) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d8 + 9 伤害. If the target is adjacent to Zindriel, the target takes 2d8 extra 伤害 from the attack.</p>]]

标准动作 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(➶) <b>Dagger</b> (weapon) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Ranged 5 (one 生物); +15 vs. AC</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 4d4 + 8 伤害.</p>]]

攻击：近战 1（一个生物） [[/roll 4d4 + 8#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(➶) <b>Dagger</b> (weapon) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 4d4 + 8 伤害.</p>]]

+15 vs. AC

命中： 2d8 + 9 伤害。如果目标邻接辛德里尔，则目标额外受到 2d8 伤害。

触发动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⚔ <b>Coordinated Fighting</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Trigger:</i> An enemy adjacent to the guard shifts or uses an attack power that does not include a Mahin’drazal guard as a target.</p><p><i>Effect (Immediate Interrupt):</i> The guard makes a melee basic attack against the triggering enemy.</p>]] ⚔ 协同作战 Coordinated Coordinated Fighting ✦ 随意

触发动作

触发： 一个邻接守卫的敌人移位或使用一个不包含玛欣德拉泽守卫作为目标的攻击威能。

效果（即时中断）： 守卫对触发敌人进行一次近战基本攻击。

（AI 翻译，未经人工校对）

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Icy Blast</b> (cold, implement, zone) ✦ <b>Encounter</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Close blast 5 (creatures in the blast); +11 vs. Fortitude</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 3d8 + 5 cold 伤害.</p><p><i>Miss:</i> Half 伤害.</p><p><i>Effect:</i> The blast creates a zone that lasts until the end of the witch’s next turn. The ground of the zone is difficult terrain for creatures without ice walk.</p><p><i>Sustain Minor:</i> The zone persists until the end of the witch’s next turn.</p>]] ᗕ 寒冰爆 Icy Icy Blast (cold, implement, zone) ✦ 遭遇

触发动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Polymorphing Escape</b> (polymorph, teleportation) ✦ <b>Recharge</b> when first bloodied</p><p><i>Trigger:</i> An enemy hits Elena with an attack.</p><p><i>Effect (Immediate Reaction):</i> Elena alters her physical form to appear as one Small or Medium ally within 10 squares of her, and she and that ally teleport to switch places. This effect lasts until the start of her next turn or until she drops to 0 hit points. Other creatures can make a DC 36 Insight check to discern that the form is a disguise.</p>]] ᗕ 变形逃脱 Polymorphing Polymorphing Escape (polymorph, teleportation) ✦ 充能 when first bloodied

效果（即时反应）： 埃琳娜改变她的物理形态，看起来像她10格内的一个小型或中型盟友，并且她和该盟友传送交换位置。此效果持续到她的下一回合开始或她生命值降至0。其他生物可以进行DC 36的洞察检定来辨别该形态是伪装。

It gains a +4 bonus to the Strength check to do so, and on a success, the tree can move up to its full speed.</p>]] 拖拽攫抓 Pulling Pulling Grab

树可以在任何自身移动的动作中，尝试移动一个被攫抓的目标。该力量检定获得+4加值，若成功，树可以移动至其完整速度。

标准动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Noose Vine</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 3 (one 生物); +12 vs. Reflex</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d8 + 3 伤害, and the tree grabs the target (escape DC 17). Until the grab ends, the target takes ongoing 5 伤害. The grab persists even if the tree is unable to take actions.</p>]] (⚔) 绞索藤 Noose Noose Vine ✦ 随意

随意 [[/roll 2d8 + 3#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">(⚔) <b>Noose Vine</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Hit:</i> 2d8 + 3 伤害, and the tree grabs the target (escape DC 17). Until the grab ends, the target takes ongoing 5 伤害. The grab persists even if the tree is unable to take actions.</p>]]

标准动作 [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">⚔ <b>Lashing Vines</b> ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Effect:</i> The tree uses noose vine twice.</p>]]

攻击：近战 3（一个生物） [[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">⚔ <b>Swallow</b> (acid) ✦ <b>Recharge</b> when the tree has no 生物 swallowed</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Melee 3 (one 生物 the tree is grabbing); +12 vs. Fortitude</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 4d8 + 12 伤害, the grab ends, and the target is swallowed (escape DC 17). While swallowed, the target is removed from play, and it takes ongoing 10 acid 伤害. When the effect ends or the tree drops to 0 hit points, the target appears in an unoccupied square of its choice adjacent to the tree.</p>]]

+12 vs. 反射 [[/roll 4d8 + 12#<p style="background-color:darkred;color:white;">⚔ <b>Swallow</b> (acid) ✦ <b>Recharge</b> when the tree has no 生物 swallowed</p><p><i>Hit:</i> 4d8 + 12 伤害, the grab ends, and the target is swallowed (escape DC 17). While swallowed, the target is removed from play, and it takes ongoing 10 acid 伤害. When the effect ends or the tree drops to 0 hit points, the target appears in an unoccupied square of its choice adjacent to the tree.</p>]]

命中： 2d8 + 3伤害，且树攫抓目标（逃脱DC 17）。直到攫抓结束，目标受到持续5伤害。即使树无法执行动作，攫抓仍然持续。

次要动作

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;">ᗕ <b>Alluring Scent</b> (charm) ✦ <b>At-Will</b> (1/round)</p><p><i>Attack:</i> Close burst 5 (enemies in the burst); +12 vs. Will</p><p><i>Hit:</i> The tree pulls the target up to 4 squares.</p>]] ᗕ 诱人香气 Alluring Alluring Scent (charm) ✦ 随意 (1/round)

次要动作

攻击：近程 爆发5（爆发内的敌人）

+12 vs. 意志

命中： 树将目标拉拽最多4格。

[[/roll 0#<p style="background-color:green;color:white;"> <b>Deceptive Veil</b> (illusion) ✦ <b>At-Will</b></p><p><i>Effect:</i> The tree disguises itself to appear as a Huge tree or treant until it uses deceptive veil again or drops to 0 hit points. Other creatures can make a DC 30 Insight check to discern the form is an illusion.</p>]] 欺骗面纱 Deceptive Deceptive Veil (illusion) ✦ 随意

次要动作

效果： 树伪装成一颗巨型树木或树精，直到再次使用欺骗面纱或生命值降至0。其他生物可以通过DC 30的洞察检定识破此幻象。

（AI 翻译，未经人工校对）

Swallow.name: 吞噬 Swallow
Swallow.description:
吞噬 Swallow

充能 当树没有吞噬任何生物时 ✦ 强酸

标准动作

攻击：近战 3（一个树正在攫抓的生物）

+12 vs. 强韧

命中： 4d8 + 12伤害，攫抓结束，且目标被吞噬（逃脱DC 17）。被吞噬时，目标移出游戏，并受到持续10强酸伤害。当效果结束或树生命值降至0时，目标出现在树相邻的一个自己选择的无人占据方格。
